title: Copy Automation Across Boards (Without Template Creation)
excerpt: Currently, when duplicating a board, email automations aren’t copied over to the new board, leading to the need for manually recreating each automation. Creating a template doesn’t solve the issue either, as email connec…

posts.author: AGLwork (Aysegul)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when duplicating a board, email automations aren’t copied over to the new board, leading to the need for manually recreating each automation. Creating a template doesn’t solve the issue either, as email connections and templates aren’t included, resulting in manual setup as well. A more efficient solution is needed for this process.
